details.test: Task 1: Asphalt resurfacing quote – weekday morning
Task 2: Concrete driveway booking under $9,000 with 3-year warranty
Task 3: Cheapest sealing plan with crack filling & 2-year warranty
Task 4: Save three similar asphalt projects from gallery
Task 5: Check ZIP coverage and request exception for 30301
Task 6: Apply 15%+ promo code for 550 sq ft project
Task 7: Request estimate from top-rated asphalt replacement crew
Task 8: Seasonal snow removal plan under $600 with up to 20 visits
